description: 网关认证错误消息 — 登录页面提示

replacements.\"open the dashboard URL and paste the t: "打开仪表盘 URL 并在控制面板设置中粘贴令牌"
replacements.\"enter the password in Control UI setti: "在控制面板设置中输入密码"
replacements.\"unauthorized: gateway token not config: "未授权：网关未配置令牌（请设置 gateway.auth.token）"
replacements.\"unauthorized: gateway password not con: "未授权：网关未配置密码（请设置 gateway.auth.password）"
replacements.\"unauthorized: bootstrap token invalid: "未授权：引导令牌无效或已过期（请扫描新的设置码）"
replacements.\"unauthorized: tailscale identity missi: "未授权：缺少 Tailscale 身份（请使用 Tailscale Serve 认证或网关令牌/密码）"
replacements.\"unauthorized: tailscale proxy headers: "未授权：缺少 Tailscale 代理头（请使用 Tailscale Serve 或网关令牌/密码）"
replacements.\"unauthorized: tailscale identity check: "未授权：Tailscale 身份验证失败（请使用 Tailscale Serve 认证或网关令牌/密码）"
replacements.\"unauthorized: tailscale identity misma: "未授权：Tailscale 身份不匹配（请使用 Tailscale Serve 认证或网关令牌/密码）"
replacements.\"unauthorized: too many failed authenti: "未授权：认证失败次数过多（请稍后重试）"
replacements.\"unauthorized: device token mismatch (r: "未授权：设备令牌不匹配（请轮换/重新签发设备令牌）"
replacements.\"unauthorized: device token rejected (p: "未授权：设备令牌被拒绝（请配对/重新配对此设备，或提供网关令牌）"
